TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi sealed SKColorspacePrimariesCicp extends System.Enum

Docs.summary: Specifies the color primaries of a color space using Coding-Independent Code Points (CICP) as defined in ITU-T H.273.

remarks.format:
## Remarks
`SKColorspacePrimariesCicp` identifies the color gamut (primary chromaticities) of a color space using the standardized numeric codes from ITU-T H.273 (formerly ISO/IEC 23091-2). These values are used in container formats such as HEIF, AVIF, and WebP to signal the intended color primaries of image data.
Pass a value from this enumeration together with a value from <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp> to <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace.CreateCicp(SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp,SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp)> to construct a standard color space.
Because this is an enumeration, no disposal is required.
## Examples
```csharp // Create a standard sRGB color space using CICP identifiers using var colorSpace = SKColorSpace.CreateCicp( SKColorspacePrimariesCicp.Rec709, SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp.Iec6196621); ```

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp GenericFilm = int32(8)

Docs.summary: Generic film color primaries as defined by CICP code point 8.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp ItuTH273Value22 = int32(22)

Docs.summary: Color primaries defined by ITU-T H.273 code point 22, covering the P3-D65 gamut used in certain display standards.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec2020 = int32(9)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.2020 / BT.2100 color primaries, used for ultra-high-definition video and HDR content (CICP code point 9).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec470SystemBg = int32(5)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.470 System B/G color primaries, used for PAL and SECAM standard-definition television (CICP code point 5).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec470SystemM = int32(4)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.470 System M color primaries, used for NTSC standard-definition television (CICP code point 4).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec601 = int32(6)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.601 color primaries, used for standard-definition video (CICP code point 6).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec709 = int32(1)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.709 color primaries, used for high-definition video and the sRGB color space (CICP code point 1).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp SmpteEg4321 = int32(12)

Docs.summary: SMPTE EG 432-1 color primaries, corresponding to the P3-D65 gamut used in Digital Cinema (CICP code point 12).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp SmpteRp4312 = int32(11)

Docs.summary: SMPTE RP 431-2 color primaries, corresponding to the DCI-P3 gamut used in Digital Cinema (CICP code point 11).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp SmpteSt240 = int32(7)

Docs.summary: SMPTE ST 240 color primaries, used for early HDTV production (CICP code point 7).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp SmpteSt4281 = int32(10)

Docs.summary: SMPTE ST 428-1 color primaries, based on the CIE 1931 XYZ color space (CICP code point 10).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Unknown = int32(0)

Docs.summary: Unknown or unspecified color primaries (CICP code point 0).
